title: Extra Flowery GUI
description: An addon to Overgrown Flowery GUI modernizing your favorite pack and adding more floral effects.  Flowers everywhere, hooray!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UYeecoyN/images/a31abac5b6635e78e3b92cd0c7b4964a2151a2e5.png)

**Become even closer to living out your cottagecore dreams using this GUI overhaul!**

Spawned from an idea for a sequel to [Overgrown Flowery GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overgrown-flowery-gui), Extra Flowery GUI has become an add-on for those who want a modernized take on your favorite GUI, with more vines and flowers!  

Many screens will now have flowers and vines everywhere, and who wouldn't want that?  
This version also reshapes many UIs giving it a cleaner more modern aesthetic, and allowing more visibility when you have your inventory open!  
One big change is the removal of container label text cause, after all, I think you know when you're using a crafting table already.  
  
This project is still early in development, only a few containers have been modified, make sure you also install the original [Overgrown Flowery GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overgrown-flowery-gui) for the full effect but keep this pack on top of your list!  

![Image showcasing that Extra Flowery GUI should be loaded above Overgrown Flowery GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UYeecoyN/images/dd0eef031f2d976e48fed776c6a4168e62c82fcc.png)


<center>

Check out the [**Slider Showcase to compare to the original and Vanilla style!**](https://imgsli.com/MzAyNTIx/0/1)

![Inventory Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UYeecoyN/images/f2d4eaf06036b01308f1f262876bd8b679edce4e.png)

</center>



Are you a fan of the new look? Make your opinions known on our [discord server](https://discord.gg/Se9TVRXF), or by leaving a comment on your platform of choice your feedback can affect the development of this addon.  

<center>
